Om Homeopathic Clinic
(ओम होम्योपैथिक क्लिनिक)

Specialist in chronic and incurable diseases
पुराने व असाध्य रोग विशेषज्ञ

Consultation by Dr. Saurabh Kumar Shukla (B.H.M.S., P.G.D.Y.), Consultant Physician at Punjabi Hospital. Registered Homeopathic Practitioner (Reg. No. HO38824). Also functions as a De-addiction Center (नशा मुक्ति केंद्र).

Call HelplineWhatsApp Chat

ABOUT US / हमारे बारे में

CONSULTANT PHYSICIAN

Dr. Saurabh Kumar ShuklaB.H.M.S., P.G.D.Y. | Reg. No. HO38824

Dr. Saurabh Kumar Shukla is a practicing homeopath and active social worker, registered under the Homeopathic Medicine Board, Uttar Pradesh (Lucknow). With over a decade of clinical experience, he is dedicated to offering safe, non-invasive, and side-effect-free treatments tailored to each patient's unique constitutional profile.

Om Homeopathic Clinic specializes in chronic and incurable diseases. In addition to general practice, Dr. Shukla functions as a De-addiction Center (नशा मुक्ति केंद्र) and serves as a Consultant Physician at Punjabi Hospital, helping individuals restore balance and achieve long-term wellness.

KEY CLINICAL FOCUS AREAS:

✓
Chronic & Incurable Diseases
✓
De-addiction (नशा मुक्ति केंद्र)
✓
Individual Constitutional Therapy
✓
Holistic, Side-Effect Free Recovery

OUR SERVICES & TREATMENTS / हमारे उपचार

Specialists in chronic and incurable diseases.

Dermatology

Skin & Hair Conditions (चर्म व केश रोग)

Safe, permanent homeopathic treatments for chronic skin allergies, eczema, psoriasis, ringworm, acne, vitiligo (white spots), severe hair loss, baldness, and premature graying.

Skin AllergiesAcne (मुहाँसे)Hair FallEczema
General Medicine

General & Chronic Diseases (सामान्य व पुराने रोग)

Gentle, holistic cures for long-standing systemic diseases like stomach/gastric disorders, paralysis, kidney and gallbladder stones, piles/fissures, arthritis, and sciatica.

GastricStones (पथरी)Piles (बवासीर)Arthritis
Specialized

Specialized Care (विशेषज्ञ उपचार)

Dedicated care plans for pediatric growth and wellness, safe homeopathic remedies for private or secret health concerns, and targeted rehabilitation therapies.

Explore Treatments →
Rehabilitation

De-addiction Center (नशा मुक्ति केंद्र)

Effective, confidential homeopathic program for natural detoxification and recovery from alcohol addiction, smoking, tobacco, and other chemical dependencies.

Learn About Recovery →
Lead Physician

Dr. Saurabh Kumar Shukla (BHMS, PGDY)

Experienced Consultant Physician at Punjabi Hospital. Registered Homeopathic Practitioner (Reg No: HO38824) specializing in complex cases and yoga therapy.

Reg No: HO38824View Profile →
24/7 Helpline

Emergency Helpline (आपातकालीन सेवा)

Contact 7398956998 or WhatsApp for remote consultation, telemedicine appointments, emergency homeopathic assistance, and digital prescriptions.

Call NowWhatsApp

CLINIC PHYSICIAN / चिकित्सक

Dr. Saurabh Kumar Shukla

B.H.M.S., P.G.D.Y.

Reg. No. HO38824 (UP)

Dr. Saurabh Kumar Shukla (B.H.M.S., P.G.D.Y.) is an experienced Homeopathic Consultant Physician and dedicated social worker specializing in chronic, complex, and incurable illnesses. In addition to his primary clinical practice, he serves as a Consultant Physician at Punjabi Hospital and actively manages a specialized De-addiction Center (नशा मुक्ति केंद्र) to support natural detox and rehabilitation. By combining advanced clinical homeopathic methodologies with yoga therapy and holistic wellness protocols, Dr. Shukla is committed to delivering safe, gentle, and highly effective natural healing pathways that foster long-term recovery and physical restoration.

CLINICAL CASES & CAMPS / सफल उपचार व शिविर

Interactive photo gallery of successful clinical treatments and community welfare initiatives.

Severe Hair Thinning Treatment

Clinical Result

Remarkable recovery in hair density and scalp health within 4 months of customized homeopathic remedies.

Kapildhara Main Clinic, Varanasi

Alopecia / Hair Loss Treatment

Clinical Result

Complete recovery and regrowth of hair patches for patients suffering from alopecia within 3 months.

Branch 1 — Letupur, Varanasi

Varanasi Community Welfare Camp

Medical Camp

Free homeopathy consultations and medicine distribution camp organized for under-served rural communities.

Kapildhara, Varanasi (GP News Featured)

Sarnath Wellness Camp

Medical Camp

Providing free health check-ups, counseling, and natural treatments to rural families in Sarnath.

Sarnath, Varanasi District

ACHIEVEMENTS & CREDENTIALS / उपलब्धियां

Awards, certificates, and community service impact milestones.

National AwardJan 2024
Homeopathy Youth Icon Award

Honored for outstanding contributions to homeopathic practice and social service in Northern India.

State HonorNov 2023
Social Worker Recognition UP

Recognized by regional boards for arranging free rural health check-up camps and wellness seminars.

CredentialMar 2021
BNI Excellence Recognition

Recognized for building outstanding healthcare networks and reliable consultation practices in Varanasi.

Public ServiceSep 2020
Corona Warrior Certificate

Awarded for delivering relentless outpatient consultation services during the COVID-19 pandemic.

Our Clinics & Schedules (क्लिनिक समय व स्थान)
Main Clinic (Khalispur)

Khalispur, Kapildhara (In front of Dharmashala No. 2 and the Tower), Varanasi

Timings:
Morning: 7:00 AM – 8:30 AM
Afternoon: 12:30 PM – 2:00 PM
Evening: 7:00 PM – 8:30 PM
Open on Sundays

Branch 1 (Ledhupur)

Balua Road, Ledhupur (Between Petrol Pump and Deepak Nursery), Varanasi

Timings:
Morning: 9:00 AM – 12:00 PM
Closed on Sundays

Branch 2 (Konia)

Kazzakpura, Konia (Before Oxford school, next to Mansa Devi Temple), Varanasi

Timings:
Evening: 5:00 PM – 7:00 PM
Closed on Sundays
